ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* User's password (hashed for security) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the service */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "subscription_plan" TEXT /* Type of subscription plan (e.g., free, premium) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the user is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the user is located */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who created the track */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre the track belongs to */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the track in seconds */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album the track belongs to */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the track was released */,
  "explicit_content" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the track contains explicit content */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Total number of times the track has been played */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the track based on user ratings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre the artist belongs to */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Short biography of the artist */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the artist's profile picture */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the artist's official website */,
  "social_media_url" TEXT /* URL to the artist's social media profile */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of users following the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "play_history" (
  "play_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each play event */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who played the track */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track played */,
  "play_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the track was played */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the track was played */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to play the track (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  "play_duration" REAL /* Duration of the play session in seconds */,
  "is_skipped" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the track was skipped */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* User's rating for the track (if provided) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("play_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_play_history_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_play_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track in the playlist */,
  "add_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the track was added to the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the playlist is public or private */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the playlist was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the playlist was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who created the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the album was released */,
  "cover_art_url" TEXT /* URL to the album cover art */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre the album belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who rated the track */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track rated */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* User's rating for the track (1-5) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "followers" (
  "follow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follow event */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who is following */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist being followed */,
  "followed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the follow occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_followers_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_followers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
